examples: Maybe they were raised in a church that was oppressively legalistic.
Freddy the Pharisee: Rigid, narrow-minded, and legalistic, he has a rule for everything.
China is trying a legalistic defence of the sale of the third and fourth reactors at Chasma.
Unfortunately, physics, economics and entrepreneurship take a backseat to our legalistic, third-party payment system.
